response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with ~20 years of broad engineering experience, but the role requires an executive-level CTO with proven leadership scaling teams from 10 to 30+, production multi-agent AI systems, and senior leadership tenure at scale-ups. The resume shows no people-management, no team scaling, no executive role, and only nascent agentic-AI exposure (a single recent mention of MCP/agentic tooling at re:cinq). Fintech exposure (RIDE Capital, ~15 months) is light and not at infrastructure-architecture depth. This is a significant level mismatch.
strengths: 20 years of polyglot engineering across backend, distributed systems, and high-throughput services (Sociomantic millions of req/s)
Some fintech and regulated-domain exposure via RIDE Capital and Optilyz pricing systems
Recent hands-on work with agentic AI infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: No evidence of engineering leadership, people management, or scaling teams to 30+ — all roles are IC-level
Multi-agent AI experience appears early-stage/tooling-focused, not production multi-agent systems at scale
No demonstrated experience with credit risk, working-capital algorithms, or governing hybrid/outsourced delivery models

key_factors.factor: Limited production multi-agent AI track record
